chapter_title.en: The Reward of Helping a Believer, Relieving Him of Distress And Showing Him Kindness

parts.text: وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال

text: : أوحى الله عز وجل إلى موسى ابن عمران: إن من عبادي من يتقرب إلي بالحسنة، فاحكمه بالجنة. قال: يا رب وما هذه الحسنة؟ قال: يدخل على مؤمن سرورا

en.muhajir-b-ali: 129. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: Allah revealed to Musa ibn 'Imran: Amongst My servants, I decree Paradise for one who draws near to Me by a certain good deed. 'O Lord,' Musa (a.s) asked, 'what is this good deed?' 'This is bringing joy to a believer,' He replied.
